subcodes.first_line: O thou who art dear to 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Thy letter was received. I learned of thine ailment, weakness, and confinement to bed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عزیز عبدالبهاء نامه رسید از تکسر مزاج شما و ناتوانی و اسیری فراش
subcodes.subjects: @non-participation in politics, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @personal instructions, @predictions and prophecies, @relationship between government and people, @obedience to and respect for government authority
